options.text: Can I take it home and sign later?
Could you sign for me instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案'I'll sign it right away.'是对请求的直接积极回应，符合职场高效流程。干扰项中，'Can I take it home...'拖延流程，'I don't need this...'否定需求，'Could you sign for me...'推卸责任，均不符合职场签字确认的规范情境。
content.speakerText: Just sign here, and I'll hand you the stuff.
content.speakerTextCn: 在这儿签个字，我就把东西给你。

options.text: I forgot my pen, can I use yours?
I think I already signed it last week.
Why do I need to sign again?

content.explanation: 正确答案'Sure, I'll sign it now.'直接回应确认请求，体现合作态度。干扰项中，'I forgot my pen'转移焦点，'I already signed'否认当前需求，'Why do I need to...'表达不满，均不符合职场礼貌与效率原则。
content.speakerText: Could you please confirm your signature on this form before we process your request?
content.speakerTextCn: 在处理您的申请前，您能确认一下这份表格上的签名吗？
